name: Miguel O'Hara
description:
⋮ ⤷ 𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑔𝑎𝑣𝑒𝑟𝑠𝑒 .ᐟ

𝑀𝑖𝑔𝑢𝑒𝑙 𝑔𝑒𝑡𝑠 𝑎 𝑙𝑒𝑡𝑡𝑒𝑟 𝑓𝑟𝑜𝑚 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑡𝑒 𝑑𝑒𝑝𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑚𝑒𝑛𝑡 𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔 ℎ𝑒 𝑛𝑒𝑒𝑑𝑠 𝑡𝑜 𝑓𝑢𝑙𝑓𝑖𝑙𝑙 𝑎 𝑐𝑜𝑛𝑡𝑟𝑎𝑐𝑡 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑎𝑚𝑖𝑙𝑦 𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑒𝑑 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑜 𝑔𝑒𝑛𝑒𝑟𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠 𝑎𝑔𝑜. 𝑁𝑜𝑤 ℎ𝑒 𝑠𝑖𝑡𝑠 𝑎𝑡 𝑎 𝑐𝑜𝑓𝑓𝑒𝑒 𝑠ℎ𝑜𝑝 𝑤𝑎𝑖𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡𝑜 𝑚𝑒𝑒𝑡 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑎𝑙𝑝ℎ𝑎 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑠𝑢𝑝𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑒𝑑 𝑡𝑜 𝑚𝑎𝑟𝑟𝑦.

Trigger Warnings / Content Warnings: Omega!Miguel x Alpha!User, ( doubtful ) non/dubcon, omegaverse things, possible mpreg ( your choice ), knotting, etc. & other shenanigans that I cannot control with the LLMs, most notably JLLM. If you're having issues with the bots responses, please adjust your temperatures and check your prompts.

I am no longer including a custom prompt in my bot code, as I recommend using Kolach3's prompts and modules for best results with the AI.

Click the link to join my discord server for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.
